name: Telegram Bot
label: Telegram Bot
description: Adds Telegram Bot API configuration, users, roles, permissions, notifications and module actions.
summary: Controls LavronOS through Telegram with users, permissions, notifications and module actions.
author: LavronOS
changelog: 0.1.4 - Restored the complete v0.11 Telegram Bot workspace, real user avatars, live action previews, modal menu editing and masked token settings; removed the unnecessary dashboard widget.
0.1.3 - Added a product runtime dashboard and first-run connection guidance.
0.1.2 - Added module-owned settings and server runtime hooks.
0.1.1 - Moved the module into an independent repository with versioned Marketplace releases.
